description: A reader should fail sync when the seed closes the session with BYE before the remaining sync messages arrive.

assertions.description: Reader rejects the remaining transcript because the wire session is already closed after BYE.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the closed-session violation.

notes: Extends simulator coverage into session-level error-path interop beyond capability-gated optional messages.
The failure should surface the same already-closed session rule that transcript-level sync-pull smoke already verifies.
